name: JU Can Eat
description: Responsive web app for centrilizing JU Ruczaj Campus restaurant menus, locations, and opening hours. Featuring custom AI-powered photo upload service and auto-translations on upload to streamline menu updates for restaurant staff.

name: CoolBeans - Smart Plantroid Experiment Platform
description: System that makes collecting and processing plant sensor data easy, enabling researchers to focus on their experiments instead of data management.

name: Network Battleships Game
description: A networked version of the classic Battleships game, allowing multiple pairs of players to compete against each other over a network connection. Implemented using Java sockets for communication and a simple command-line interface for gameplay.

name: Fortran Interpreter
description: A simple interpreter for classic Fortran (Fortran 66/77 style).

name: Presently
description: Desktop app for tracking focus indicators and providing insights on work habits. Built with Electron and React, it offers a user-friendly interface for monitoring productivity and identifying patterns in work and relaxation behavior. Built during Hacknarok 2026.
